summary: QA sign-off for Iteration 1: test infrastructure setup (US-1-1) and ProfileCubit implementation verification (US-1-4). All acceptance criteria met. dart analyze passes (zero new violations). flutter test passes 100% (5/5 tests). Blockers fixed (onChanged parameter, network_image_mock conflict, build_runner). US-1-2 and US-1-3 deferred to Iteration 2 per PO scope. US-1-5 (code review) pending tech_lead completion.

qualityGates.name: dart_analyze_passes
qualityGates.notes: dart analyze executed successfully with zero new violations in iter-1 code. 2 pre-existing warnings, 34 pre-existing info-level violations (withOpacity deprecation, unused imports) are deferred to tech_lead cleanup.

qualityGates.name: flutter_test_passes
qualityGates.notes: flutter test executed successfully. 5/5 tests pass: 1 placeholder test, 4 ProfileCubit blocTests (initial state, loading→data success, loading→error failure, reset). No test failures.

qualityGates.name: acceptance_criteria_verified
qualityGates.notes: US-1-1 (test infrastructure): ✓ mocktail and bloc_test in dev_dependencies, test directory tree created, flutter pub get resolves cleanly. US-1-4 (ProfileCubit + Profile page): ✓ ProfileCubit lazySingleton registered, GetMyProfileUseCase exists, profile page covers all 4 ResultState branches (loading, data, error, and implicit initial). All new UI strings in app_es.arb with profile_ prefix. No hardcoded Spanish.

qualityGates.name: blockers_resolved
qualityGates.notes: BLOCKER 1 (onChanged parameter): Fixed by changing to onFieldSubmitted in event_form_locations_section.dart. BLOCKER 2 (mockito conflict): Resolved by removing network_image_mock from pubspec.yaml. BLOCKER 3 (build_runner): Succeeded after pubspec cleanup.

qualityGates.name: code_generation_successful
qualityGates.notes: dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs executed successfully. All freezed, json_serializable, injectable, envied, retrofit generators produced output. No stale code generation errors.
